title: Sine Wave Simulation
summary: An interactive visualization that demonstrates how sine waves are generated from circular motion 🌀. Originally built with HTML5 Canvas and vanilla JavaScript, later ported to D3.js for richer SVG-based rendering. This was my very first project — the one that sparked my love for coding and creative problem-solving. It holds a special place in my heart as a reminder of where it all began 💛.
contributions: Built the initial prototype using HTML5 Canvas and raw JavaScript to animate circular motion and sine wave generation
Ported the entire visualization to D3.js v7 with SVG rendering for smoother animations and cleaner code architecture
Implemented real-time animated mapping between a rotating point on a circle and the resulting sine wave curve
Visualized core trigonometric concepts — rotating radius vector, swept angle arc, and y-coordinate projection — with color-coded elements
Migrated the codebase to TypeScript and Vite for type safety and a modern dev experience

title: WeldTrace – Smart Welding Manager
summary: A cloud-based fabrication job management platform for weld-mapping, weld tracking, and full lifecycle traceability. Engineers, inspectors, contractors, and welders collaborate in a shared ecosystem to manage WPS/PQR documents, welder qualifications, and project jobs — replacing fragile spreadsheet workflows with a code-compliant, auditable system.
contributions: Built a Weld Annotation Editor enabling engineers to mark up P&ID drawings with precise weld symbols and positional metadata
Designed and implemented the core data model for weld joints, WPS/PQR documents, welder qualifications, and job traceability
Developed a Weld Input Editor — a hybrid data-grid and spreadsheet component for fast, structured entry of weld records at scale
Contributed to multi-role access architecture allowing contractors, project managers, engineers, inspectors, and welders to collaborate within a single project lifecycle

title: WeldQ – Welder Qualification Platform
summary: A full-stack certification platform developed for WTIA (Welding Technology Institute of Australia) to digitise the end-to-end welder qualification lifecycle. WeldQ replaces paper-based processes with a standards-compliant system covering online exam delivery, automated result processing, drag-and-drop certificate design, and long-term credential management — enabling WTIA to certify welders at scale with confidence and compliance.
contributions: Engineered a custom test engine from scratch, supporting timed online exams with question banks, randomisation, and auto-grading for welder qualification assessments
Built an Exam Schedule Editor allowing administrators to plan, configure, and manage certification exam sessions across multiple locations and candidate cohorts
Developed a drag-and-drop Certificate Designer enabling staff to compose branded, standards-compliant qualification certificates populated with live welder data
Implemented a Result Dashboard delivering real-time insights into exam outcomes, pass/fail rates, and per-candidate performance metrics
Designed a document verification and management module to store, validate, and track welder credentials and supporting evidence for regulatory compliance

title: Eform – Government E-Application Platform
summary: A sophisticated e-governance platform built to eliminate paperwork from high-stakes citizen-facing registration workflows. Eform automates the full lifecycle of government processes — from marriage registration and driving licence applications to birth registration — replacing fragile manual procedures with a structured, rules-driven digital system. At its core is a visual drag-and-drop service designer for data modelling and a dynamic form studio that empowers administrators to compose, map, and publish complex regulatory forms without writing a line of code.
contributions: Built custom AngularJS directives powered by the jQuery Drag and Drop API to enable visual data model diagramming inside the service designer — allowing administrators to define entity relationships through drag-and-drop interactions rather than manual configuration
Developed a highly interactive form mapping studio for visually binding data model entities to form fields, with real-time layout preview and support for complex nested field relationships

Engineered a dynamic form generation engine that renders conditional, multi-step government registration forms at runtime from configuration schemas — supporting diverse regulatory structures across multiple service types

Implemented a service designer for modelling government registration workflows as reusable, composable process blueprints, enabling rapid onboarding of new registration services with minimal engineering overhead
Delivered end-to-end process automation for multiple high-volume government registration domains including marriage registration, driving licence applications, and birth registration

title: Tradeworks – Algorithmic Trading Automation Platform
summary: A cloud-based, real-time trade automation platform built for retail forex traders looking to get started with algorithmic trading — without writing a single line of code. Tradeworks lets traders compose, backtest, and deploy custom strategies as live automated bots that run 24/7, integrated directly with MetaTrader. The platform blends a rich charting experience powered by ChartIQ with visual multi-indicator tooling, giving traders both the analytical depth of a professional terminal and the simplicity of a no-code strategy builder.
contributions: Integrated the ChartIQ professional forex charting library into the Angular platform, configuring real-time data feeds, custom chart types, and toolbar extensions for live market visualisation
Built custom Angular components for multi-selection of technical indicators, enabling traders to layer and configure complex indicator combinations from a single, intuitive interface
Implemented trade entry and exit point visualisation using the Canvas API, rendering precise overlays on live charts to give traders a transparent, real-time view of their bot's decision logic
Developed reactive data pipelines with RxJS to stream and synchronise live market data, bot status, and trade signals across the platform with minimal latency
Contributed to the visual strategy builder interface, allowing non-technical retail traders to compose algorithmic trading strategies through a drag-and-configure workflow without writing code

title: Choice Health Brokers – Internal CRM Platform
summary: A purpose-built internal CRM and communications platform developed from the ground up for a brokerage firm. The platform centralises client and agent management in a single, streamlined workspace — complete with a fully functional in-browser softphone and outbound dialer powered by the Twilio API. Agents can place and receive calls without ever leaving the dashboard, turning a fragmented workflow into a unified, real-time experience built on React and Redux.
contributions: Designed and built a fully interactive editable data grid for managing broker and agent records, supporting inline cell editing, column sorting, and real-time validation without leaving the table view
Integrated the Twilio Programmable Voice API to implement an in-browser dialer, enabling agents to place outbound calls directly from the CRM with call state management driven by Redux

Built a softphone interface for handling inbound call routing in the browser — ring detection, call accept/reject, and live call controls — eliminating the need for external hardware or third-party desk phones
Architected the application from scratch using React and Redux, establishing the component library, state topology, and data flow patterns that the entire platform is built upon
Synchronised real-time call events from the Twilio SDK with UI state to deliver accurate, live status indicators across the dialer, agent list, and activity feed simultaneously

title: AdeptIQ – Paratransit Dispatch Engine
summary: A cloud-based paratransit and demand-responsive transit management platform built for public transit agencies — powering the full dispatch lifecycle from real-time driver tracking to ADA-compliant trip booking. At its core is a high-performance dispatch engine that coordinates drivers, vehicles, and passengers across live maps and interactive data grids, delivering 95%+ on-time performance through optimised routing and real-time operational intelligence. The platform serves dispatchers, drivers, and passengers through a unified, configurable ecosystem backed by a JSON:API-compliant booking service.
contributions: Achieved a 120% improvement in data grid rendering performance by replacing the legacy grid with a virtualized React data grid embedded within the Ember.js application — eliminating lag on large dispatcher datasets
Implemented real-time driver status updates in Ember.js using WebSockets, enabling dispatchers to monitor vehicle positions and availability with zero manual refresh across active trips
Integrated Leaflet map rendering into the Ember.js dispatch interface, providing dispatchers with a live geographic view of active vehicles, trip routes, and dynamic route overlays
Designed and implemented the full data model for the booking service, translating complex paratransit scheduling rules into a normalised PostgreSQL schema via Sequelize ORM
Built a suite of REST APIs strictly conforming to the JSON:API specification for the booking service, enabling clean, predictable integration with frontend clients and third-party transit systems
